reviews.review_description: Hi, sorry for posting here about the issue but I couldn’t find your contact address. I was excited to see one of your new videos but the links are not working, I’m trying to open it from your main web site but it leads to blank pages. I hope you can fix this soon. Cheers.

reviews.review_title: In Opera Venice with Dart can be funny
reviews.review_description:
There are so many superb opera houses in the world. But, I must admit, Opera Venice must be most extravagant, most beautiful one. I enjoyed the VR experience, could follow Dart and admire the breathtakingly striking   auditorium, other stunning rooms too, especially being in the Royal box, enjoying the magnificent view into the auditorium and to the stage was exciting.

Dart's faux pas and his reaction afterwads was such a classy touch. I liked the authenticity of the experience, apparently it was published untampered. Kudos!
